user.title: Set up Housework
user.description: This will set up the Housework integration for managing household chores.

frequency_value.name: Frequency value
frequency_value.description: Repeat interval (e.g., every N days/weeks/months). Default: 1.

frequency_days_of_week.name: Days of week
frequency_days_of_week.description: Days of the week (0=Mon, 6=Sun). Only for 'day_of_week' type.

frequency_day_of_month.name: Day of month
frequency_day_of_month.description: Day of the month (1-31). Only for 'monthly' type.

scheduling_mode.name: Scheduling mode
scheduling_mode.description: 'Rolling' calculates from last completion, 'Fixed' keeps original cadence.

assignees.name: Assignees
assignees.description: Person entities to assign this task to.

next_due.name: First due date
next_due.description: When the task is first due. Defaults to today.

complete_task.name: Complete task
complete_task.description: Mark a housework task as completed.

completed_by.name: Completed by
completed_by.description: Person who completed the task. Defaults to current assignee.

completed_at.name: Completed at
completed_at.description: When the task was completed. Defaults to now.

skip_task.name: Skip task
skip_task.description: Skip the current occurrence of a task without completing it.

snooze_task.name: Snooze task
snooze_task.description: Postpone a task to a specific date.

snooze_until.name: Snooze until
snooze_until.description: Date to postpone the task to.

reassign_task.name: Reassign task
reassign_task.description: Change the current assignee of a task.

assignee.name: Assign to
assignee.description: Person to assign the task to.

update_task.name: Update task
update_task.description: Update properties of an existing task.
